Virtual Assistant Job Ad Template

[MAKE A COPY: FILE > MAKE A COPY]



About Us



We are a [COMPANY DESCRIPTION] for Virtual Assistants for our Influencer Marketing Department.





About the Role



Love working with influencers and using social media?



The Influencer Marketing VA we are looking for plays an integral part in our growth strategy. We are seeking a digitally savvy marketing mind to execute our influencer marketing strategies and creative campaigns. The position is responsible for contacting and developing relationships with bloggers and influencers, Instagram and YouTube in particular.





Duties and Responsibilities



Identify and build relationships with influencers using predefined templates



Actively scout for new faces and emerging talents



Be able to analyse competition's influencers



Maintain an influencer database



Keep abreast of emerging trends, technologies and influencers



Brainstorm new, creative approaches to influencer campaigns



Work on fast deadlines



Record and report influencer campaign data into spreadsheets



Monitor influencer campaigns (check on influencers each day to make sure posts are going up, being posted correctly, etc.)



Requirements



Reliable and goal-oriented



Proven track record in outreach campaign strategies



Strong knowledge of social media platforms



Well-organized with great time management skills



Impeccable English verbal and written communication skills



Positive self-starter and strategic thinker



Be able to work [FULL TIME/PART TIME]



Comfortable working under a remote supervisor



Willing to learn influencer marketing software on the job



Negotiation skills are a plus
